diffs.before:
# .github/workflows/release.yml
# Create binaries on each release
name: goreleaser

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*' # only version tags trigger a run

permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release
  packages: write      # Docker: push to GHCR
  attestations: write  # Docker: build provenance attestation
  id-token: write      # Docker: OIDC token for attestation signing

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # fetch all tags so GoReleaser sees them
      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: stable
      - name: Extract changelog for this version
        run: |
          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}"
          # Extract the section between this version's heading and the next
          awk "/^## \[${VERSION}\]/{found=1; next} /^## \[/{if(found) exit} found" CHANGELOG.md > release-notes.md
      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          distribution: goreleaser
          version: "~> v2"
          args: release --clean --release-notes=release-notes.md
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log in to GHCR
        uses: docker/login-action@v4
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v6
        with:
          images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable={{is_default_branch}}

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4

      - name: Build and push
        id: push
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

      - name: Generate artifact attestation
        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
        with:
          subject-name: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          subject-digest: ${{ steps.push.outputs.digest }}
          push-to-registry: true
diffs.after:
# .github/workflows/release.yml
# Create binaries on each release
name: goreleaser

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*' # only version tags trigger a run

permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release & checkout

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # fetch all tags so GoReleaser sees them
      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: stable
      - name: Extract changelog for this version
        run: |
          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}"
          # Extract the section between this version's heading and the next
          awk "/^## \[${VERSION}\]/{found=1; next} /^## \[/{if(found) exit} found" CHANGELOG.md > release-notes.md
      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          distribution: goreleaser
          version: "~> v2"
          args: release --clean --release-notes=release-notes.md
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read       # checkout
      packages: write      # push to GHCR
      attestations: write  # build provenance attestation
      id-token: write      # OIDC token for attestation signing
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log in to GHCR
        uses: docker/login-action@v4
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v6
        with:
          images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable={{is_default_branch}}

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4

      - name: Build and push
        id: push
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

      - name: Generate artifact attestation
        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
        with:
          subject-name: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          subject-digest: ${{ steps.push.outputs.digest }}
          push-to-registry: true

parts.text:
You are in the repo at /Users/jaronswab/go/src/github.com/jrswab/axe on branch ISS-36/docker-build-in-goreleaser.

Edit the file `.github/workflows/release.yml` to narrow the permission scope. Here is the exact change needed:

**Current top-level permissions block (lines 10-14):**
```yaml
permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release
  packages: write      # Docker: push to GHCR
  attestations: write  # Docker: build provenance attestation
  id-token: write      # Docker: OIDC token for attestation signing
```

**Replace with** a minimal top-level block that only grants what ALL jobs need:
```yaml
permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release & checkout
```

Then add job-level permissions to ONLY the `docker` job. The `goreleaser` job does NOT get job-level permissions (it inherits the global `contents: write` which is all it needs).

For the `docker` job, add a `permissions` block right after `runs-on: ubuntu-latest` with:
```yaml
    permissions:
      contents: read       # checkout
      packages: write      # push to GHCR
      attestations: write  # build provenance attestation
      id-token: write      # OIDC token for attestation signing
```

IMPORTANT: When a job specifies its own `permissions`, it does NOT inherit the workflow-level permissions — it gets ONLY what's listed in its own block. That's why we must explicitly include `contents: read` in the docker job's permissions even though `contents: write` is set globally.

The final file should look like this (showing the structure):

```yaml
# .github/workflows/release.yml
# Create binaries on each release
name: goreleaser

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*' # only version tags trigger a run

permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release & checkout

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      ... (unchanged)

  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read       # checkout
      packages: write      # push to GHCR
      attestations: write  # build provenance attestation
      id-token: write      # OIDC token for attestation signing
    steps:
      ... (unchanged)
```

After making the edit, read back the full file and return its complete contents so I can verify correctness. Do NOT change anything else in the file — only the permissions blocks.
Let me read the current file first.

# Create binaries on each release
name: goreleaser

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*' # only version tags trigger a run

permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release & checkout

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # fetch all tags so GoReleaser sees them
      - name: Set up Go
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: stable
      - name: Extract changelog for this version
        run: |
          VERSION="${GITHUB_REF_NAME#v}"
          # Extract the section between this version's heading and the next
          awk "/^## \[${VERSION}\]/{found=1; next} /^## \[/{if(found) exit} found" CHANGELOG.md > release-notes.md
      - name: Run GoReleaser
        uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
        with:
          distribution: goreleaser
          version: "~> v2"
          args: release --clean --release-notes=release-notes.md
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  docker:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read       # checkout
      packages: write      # push to GHCR
      attestations: write  # build provenance attestation
      id-token: write      # OIDC token for attestation signing
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log in to GHCR
        uses: docker/login-action@v4
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

      - name: Extract metadata
        id: meta
        uses: docker/metadata-action@v6
        with:
          images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          tags: |
            type=semver,pattern={{version}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
            type=semver,pattern={{major}}
            type=raw,value=latest,enable={{is_default_branch}}

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4

      - name: Build and push
        id: push
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
        with:
          context: .
          push: true
          tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
          labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
          cache-from: type=gha
          cache-to: type=gha,mode=max

      - name: Generate artifact attestation
        uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
        with:
          subject-name: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
          subject-digest: ${{ steps.push.outputs.digest }}
          push-to-registry: true

29:           awk "/^## \[${VERSION}\]/{found=1; next} /^## \[/{if(found) exit} found" CHANGELOG.md > release-notes.md
30:       - name: Run GoReleaser
31:         uses: goreleaser/goreleaser-action@v6
32:         with:
33:           distribution: goreleaser
34:           version: "~> v2"
35:           args: release --clean --release-notes=release-notes.md
36:         env:
37:           GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
38: 
39:   docker:
40:     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
41:     permissions:
42:       contents: read       # checkout
43:       packages: write      # push to GHCR
44:       attestations: write  # build provenance attestation
45:       id-token: write      # OIDC token for attestation signing
46:     steps:
47:       - name: Checkout
48:         uses: actions/checkout@v4
49: 
50:       - name: Log in to GHCR
51:         uses: docker/login-action@v4
52:         with:
53:           registry: ghcr.io
54:           username: ${{ github.actor }}
55:           password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
56: 
57:       - name: Extract metadata
58:         id: meta
59:         uses: docker/metadata-action@v6
60:         with:
61:           images: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
62:           tags: |
63:             type=semver,pattern={{version}}
64:             type=semver,pattern={{major}}.{{minor}}
65:             type=semver,pattern={{major}}
66:             type=raw,value=latest,enable={{is_default_branch}}
67: 
68:       - name: Set up Docker Buildx
69:         uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v4
70: 
71:       - name: Build and push
72:         id: push
73:         uses: docker/build-push-action@v7
74:         with:
75:           context: .
76:           push: true
77:           tags: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tags }}
78:           labels: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.labels }}
79:           cache-from: type=gha
80:           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
81: 
82:       - name: Generate artifact attestation
83:         uses: actions/attest-build-provenance@v2
84:         with:
85:           subject-name: ghcr.io/${{ github.repository }}
86:           subject-digest: ${{ steps.push.outputs.digest }}
87:           push-to-registry: true

(End of file - total 87 lines)
</content>
state.title: .github/workflows/release.yml

metadata.preview:
# .github/workflows/release.yml
# Create binaries on each release
name: goreleaser

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*' # only version tags trigger a run

permissions:
  contents: write      # GoReleaser: create GitHub Release & checkout

jobs:
  goreleaser:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # fetch all tags so GoReleaser sees them

parts.text:
The file is correct. Here's a summary of the two changes made:

1. **Top-level `permissions`** (lines 10-11): Reduced from 4 entries to a single `contents: write` — only what both jobs universally need.

2. **`docker` job `permissions`** (lines 41-45): Added a job-level block with `contents: read`, `packages: write`, `attestations: write`, and `id-token: write`. Because job-level permissions override the workflow-level ones entirely, `contents: read` is explicitly listed so the checkout step still works.

The `goreleaser` job is unchanged and inherits `contents: write` from the workflow level, which is all it needs.
